items.briefing:
A recent report highlights that Australian and New Zealand organisations are adopting AI tools faster than they are putting rules and oversight in place to govern them — creating potential security and compliance risks. Separately, a warning for the education sector: third-party vendor breaches continue to be a costly problem, with schools and training organisations often exposed through suppliers they trust but don't closely monitor.

**Practical tip:** Review which external vendors or software providers have access to your organisation's data, and confirm they meet your security expectations — your risk doesn't stop at your own front door.

featured.title: AI use outpaces governance in Australia & New Zealand
featured.quote: Half of Australian organisations lack AI governance, creating serious security and compliance risks.
